headline: Abbott (ABT) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: Here's Why
summary: Abbott (ABT) closed at $114.12 in the latest trading session, marking a -1.92% move from the prior day.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like ABT and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Over the last six months, Abbott Laboratories’s shares have sunk to $116.31, producing a disappointing 11.5% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 7.7% gain. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) Emerges as a Top Dividend Stock with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is a top dividend stock with a secure 2.17% yield, 10+ years of growth, and strong financials for reliable passive income.

headline: Abbott wins FDA approval for updated heart failure monitoring device
summary: The company redesigned the reader to fit in a carry-on suitcase and be easier to use day to day.
